hero.title: Malaysia's Premier Institutional Brokerage
hero.description: Architectural Stability for High-Value Transitions. We provide the structural integrity required for Malaysia's most significant SME divestments and acquisitions.

stat_monolith.label: Market Presence
stat_monolith.description: Total enterprise value facilitated across West and East Malaysia since 2010.

kpis.listings_desc: Pre-screened institutional opportunities across manufacturing, logistics, and technology sectors in the Klang Valley.
kpis.transitions_desc: High-value exits completed with absolute discretion. Our transition framework ensures operational continuity post-sale.
kpis.years_desc: A decade and a half of navigating complex market cycles with consistent, institutional-grade results.
kpis.completion_desc: In a market where only 20% of listed businesses sell, our precision methodology keeps clients in the elite majority.

process.title: A Simple, Transparent Process
process.description: Our proprietary five-step framework is designed for the Malaysian corporate landscape, ensuring clarity at every milestone.

steps.list_desc: Initial documentation and anonymous listing setup within our private network.
steps.screen_desc: Rigorous financial vetting of potential acquirers to ensure capital readiness.
steps.introduce_desc: Controlled meetings facilitated by our lead partners to establish synergy.
steps.due_diligence_desc: Comprehensive audit of assets, liabilities, and intellectual property.
steps.complete_desc: Legal execution and secure funds transfer through institutional escrow.

values.title: The Reliance Standard
values.description: We operate on the principle of Diam-Diam Berisi — quiet but substantial. Our reputation is built on the strength of our data and the discretion of our operations.
values.klang_valley_desc: Deep local intelligence across Malaysia's key economic hubs with real-time proprietary data.
values.discretion_desc: Your transaction details are guarded with institutional security protocols and legal shielding.
values.valuations_desc: Our valuation models go beyond EBITDA. We account for local supply chain dominance and Malaysian market volatility to deliver true institutional exit values.
values.matchmaking_desc: We don't just find buyers; we find successors. Our network includes family offices, private equity, and institutional investors seeking regional growth.

cta_final.title: Secure Your Business Legacy in Malaysia.
cta_final.description: Initiate a confidential consultation with our lead brokers today. No obligations, absolute privacy.

footer.company_desc: Malaysia's premier institutional brokerage for high-value business transitions.

about.title: Fifteen Years of Institutional Excellence
about.description1: Since 2010, Reliance Brokerage has been Malaysia's quiet architect of high-value business transitions. We don't compete on noise; we compete on results.
about.description2: Our reputation is built on three pillars: Deep local intelligence, Ironclad discretion, and Institutional-grade execution.
about.pillar1_desc: Our team knows every supply chain, every regulatory corner, every buyer preference in the Klang Valley and beyond.
about.pillar2_desc: Your transaction details are shielded with institutional protocols and legal safeguards. Nobody knows your business until you approve.
about.pillar3_desc: We succeed when your business finds the right buyer at the right valuation. Long-term relationships matter more than one-off deals.
about.leadership_desc: Our team comprises seasoned M&A professionals, financial analysts, and deal architects with deep roots in the Malaysian business ecosystem. Combined experience exceeds 200 years in institutional finance.
about.team_bio: Experience and expertise in institutional business advisory.
about.cta_title: Ready to Secure Your Business Legacy?
about.cta_desc: Let's discuss how Reliance Brokerage can help you navigate your next business transition.

listings.title: Active Business Listings
listings.description: Curated institutional-grade opportunities pre-screened for institutional buyers.
listings.list_desc: Choose how you want to offer your business to our qualified institutional network.

valuations.title: Precision Valuations for Institutional Exits
valuations.description: Our proprietary valuation framework goes beyond standard EBITDA multiples. We account for local market dynamics, supply chain positioning, and institutional buyer expectations.
valuations.step1_desc: We understand your business, goals, and timeline in a confidential meeting.
valuations.step2_desc: Our team analyzes 3–5 years of financials, contracts, and operational data.
valuations.step3_desc: Detailed report with valuation range, methodology, and market positioning.

how_it_works.week1_desc: Confidential consultation and preliminary documentation gathering.
how_it_works.week2_desc: Anonymous listing circulated to qualified institutional buyers.
how_it_works.week3_desc: Controlled buyer meetings and letter of intent negotiation.
how_it_works.week4_desc: Comprehensive financial, legal, and operational due diligence.
how_it_works.week5_desc: Final agreements, legal execution, and institutional escrow transfer.

legal.terms_2_body2: Under this license you may not:

legal.terms_2_li3: • Attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software
legal.terms_2_li4: • Remove any copyright or other proprietary notations

legal.terms_4_body: In no event shall Reliance Brokerage or its suppliers be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Reliance Brokerage's website.
legal.privacy_1_body: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as:
legal.privacy_1_li1: • Name, email address, and phone number
legal.privacy_2_body: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, send communications, and comply with applicable laws and regulations.
legal.privacy_3_body: Your privacy and the security of your information is our highest priority. We implement industry-standard encryption and security protocols to protect your data. We never sell your information to third parties.
legal.privacy_4_body: We retain your information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. You may request deletion of your account at any time.
legal.privacy_5_body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Reach out for confidential consultations, listing enquiries, or general questions. We respond within 24 hours.
contact.success_desc: Your message has been forwarded to our WhatsApp. We will be in touch shortly.
contact.response_desc: WhatsApp enquiries are typically answered within 2 hours during business hours (Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm MYT). Email responses within 24 hours.

hero.title: 马来西亚首屈一指的机构级经纪公司
hero.description: 为高价值交易提供结构稳定性。我们为马来西亚最重要的中小企业出售和收购交易提供所需的结构完整性。

stat_monolith.label: 市场地位
stat_monolith.description: 自2010年以来在马来西亚西部和东部促进的企业总价值。

kpis.listings_desc: 雪兰莪地区制造业、物流和科技领域经过审查的机构级商机。
kpis.transitions_desc: 以绝对保密的方式完成的高价值交易。我们的转移框架确保交易后的运营连续性。
kpis.years_desc: 在过去十五年中，通过复杂的市场周期一直保持一致的机构级业绩。
kpis.completion_desc: 在只有20%的上市业务成交的市场中，我们的精准方法让客户进入精英行列。

process.title: 简单透明的流程
process.description: 我们的专有五步框架是为马来西亚公司环境设计的，确保每个里程碑的清晰度。

steps.list_desc: 初始文件和在我们私人网络中设置匿名房源。
steps.screen_desc: 对潜在收购方进行严格的财务审查以确保资本准备。
steps.introduce_desc: 由我们的主要合作伙伴促进的受控会议以建立协同作用。
steps.due_diligence_desc: 对资产、负债和知识产权进行全面审计。
steps.complete_desc: 通过机构托管进行法律执行和安全资金转移。

values.title: 信任标准
values.description: 我们遵循「深藏不露」的原则——沉默但实质。我们的声誉建立在我们的数据强度和运营保密性之上。
values.klang_valley_desc: 对马来西亚关键经济中心的深入本地智能，具有实时专有数据。
values.discretion_desc: 您的交易细节受到机构安全协议和法律保护。
values.valuations_desc: 我们的估值模型超越EBITDA。我们考虑了本地供应链优势和马来西亚市场波动性，以提供真正的机构出口价值。
values.matchmaking_desc: 我们不仅仅寻找买家；我们寻找继承人。我们的网络包括家族办公室、私募股权和寻求区域增长的机构投资者。

cta_final.title: 在马来西亚保护您的业务遗产。
cta_final.description: 今天与我们的主要经纪人进行机密咨询。无义务，绝对隐私。

footer.company_desc: 马来西亚高价值业务过渡的首选机构经纪。

about.title: 十五年机构卓越
about.description1: 自2010年以来，信赖经纪一直是马来西亚高价值业务过渡的幕后推手。我们不以声势竞争，我们以业绩竞争。
about.description2: 我们的声誉建立在三大支柱上：深入的本地智能、铁血的保密性和机构级的执行力。
about.pillar1_desc: 我们的团队了解雪兰莪谷及其周边地区的每条供应链、每个监管角落、每个买家偏好。
about.pillar2_desc: 您的交易细节受到机构协议和法律保障的保护。直到您批准，没有人知道您的业务。
about.pillar3_desc: 当您的业务以合适的估值找到合适的买家时，我们才算成功。长期关系比一次性交易更重要。
about.leadership_desc: 我们的团队由经验丰富的并购专业人士、财务分析师和交易架构师组成，在马来西亚商业生态系统中根深蒂固。综合经验超过200年的机构金融。
about.team_bio: 在机构商业咨询方面拥有丰富的经验和专业知识。
about.cta_title: 准备好保护您的业务遗产了吗？
about.cta_desc: 让我们讨论信赖经纪如何帮助您顺利完成下一次业务过渡。

listings.title: 活跃业务房源
listings.description: 经过机构买家预审的精选机构级机会。
listings.list_desc: 选择您希望向我们合格机构网络提供业务的方式。
listings.no_results: 没有符合筛选条件的房源。

valuations.title: 为机构退出提供精准估值
valuations.description: 我们的专有估值框架超越了标准的EBITDA倍数。我们考虑了本地市场动态、供应链定位和机构买家预期。
valuations.institutional_feature1: 包含标准版所有内容，另加：
valuations.step1_desc: 我们在保密会议中了解您的业务、目标和时间表。
valuations.step2_desc: 我们的团队分析3至5年的财务数据、合同和运营数据。
valuations.step3_desc: 包含估值范围、方法论和市场定位的详细报告。

how_it_works.week1_desc: 保密咨询和初步文件收集。
how_it_works.week2_desc: 匿名房源向合格机构买家流通。
how_it_works.week3_desc: 受控买家会议和意向书谈判。
how_it_works.week4_desc: 全面的财务、法律和运营尽职调查。
how_it_works.week5_desc: 最终协议、法律执行和机构托管转移。

forgot_password.subtitle: 输入您注册的电子邮件，我们将向您发送安全重置链接。
forgot_password.success_desc: 如果该电子邮件存在账户，我们已发送安全密码重置链接。请检查您的收件箱和垃圾邮件文件夹。

legal.terms_1_body: 这些服务条款管理您对信赖经纪网站和服务的使用。通过访问和使用本网站，您确认您已阅读、理解并同意受这些条款约束。
legal.terms_2_body1: 仅允许临时下载信赖经纪网站上的一份材料副本，用于个人、非商业性过渡性查看。这是许可证的授予，而非所有权转让。
legal.terms_2_li2: • 将材料用于任何商业目的或任何公开展示
legal.terms_2_li3: • 尝试反编译或逆向工程任何软件
legal.terms_2_li4: • 删除任何版权或其他专有标注
legal.terms_3_body: 信赖经纪网站上的材料以「现状」提供。信赖经纪不作任何明示或暗示的保证，并在此声明并否定所有其他保证，包括对适销性或特定目的适用性的暗示保证。
legal.terms_4_body: 在任何情况下，信赖经纪或其供应商均不对因使用或无法使用信赖经纪网站上的材料而产生的任何损害承担责任。
legal.privacy_1_body: 我们收集您直接向我们提供的信息，例如：
legal.privacy_1_li1: • 姓名、电子邮件地址和电话号码
legal.privacy_2_title: 2. 我们如何使用您的信息
legal.privacy_2_body: 我们使用收集的信息来提供、维护和改进我们的服务，处理交易，发送通信，以及遵守适用的法律法规。
legal.privacy_3_body: 您的隐私和信息安全是我们的最高优先事项。我们实施行业标准加密和安全协议来保护您的数据。我们绝不将您的信息出售给第三方。
legal.privacy_4_body: 我们在提供服务和遵守法律义务所必需的时间内保留您的信息。您可以随时请求删除您的账户。
legal.privacy_5_body: 如果您对本隐私政策或我们的隐私实践有疑问，请联系我们

contact.title: 联系方式
contact.description: 如需保密咨询、房源查询或一般问题，请联系我们。我们在24小时内回复。
contact.message_placeholder: 告诉我们您的咨询内容...
contact.success_desc: 您的信息已转发至我们的WhatsApp。我们将尽快与您联系。
contact.response_desc: WhatsApp咨询通常在工作时间（周一至周五，上午9时至下午6时马来西亚时间）2小时内回复。电子邮件回复时间为24小时内。
